violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the 3-bay area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Observed bottom shelf in second aisle of facility with rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC shall clean and monitor for rodent droppings. If activity is still observed PIC must contact pest control to do a full assessment for facility. -PIC shall provide proof of pest control to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
Observed a hole in the bathroom wall on left side of toilet. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the 3-bay area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

The floors behind equipment/shelving throughout the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
